creator: mi@privatelabs.com
text:
It appears,  certain KOI8 characters are  not treated as
	word-boundaries.

How-To-Repeat: 
	If your LANG is set  to ru_SU.KOI8-R or ru_UA.KOI8-U and
	you see the word  "횞횕횒횂횁횚" properly, try double clicking
	on  it  in  an  xterm. Xterm  will  place  "횕횒횂횁횚"  into
	selection, instead  of the whole thing.  For some reason
	both '횞' and '첨' are always treated like that.
